# Third-Party Code Notices

This file records third-party code that was copied into `pyimgano` and the required attribution.

Format (one entry per upstream source):

```
- Upstream: <org/repo> @ <commit-or-tag>
  License: <MIT|Apache-2.0|BSD-3-Clause|...>
  Files:
  - <pyimgano/path/to/file.py>
  Notes: <what was copied / what changed>
```

If **no third-party code** has been copied, this file can remain empty (besides this template).
